title: Year 12 students in Melbourne caught cheating using AI
description: An all-boys school in Melbourne's outer east has taken action after several students were caught cheating on a Year 12 exam using AI.

title: Year 12 students in Melbourne caught cheating using AI - Australian Broadcasting Corporation

title: AI could soon use 3% of world’s electricity and more water than we need to drink: UN report
description: New report says the use of AI will follow ‘Jevons paradox’, which predicts that when technological improvements increase the efficiency of a resource, it leads to a rise, rather than a fall, in the total consumption of that resource.

title: OpenAI Files for IPO Days After Anthropic – Two AI Giants Head to Wall Street
description: The two most valuable AI companies in the world are now both headed to public markets, setting up one of the most consequential IPO windows in technology history.

title: Apple introduces Siri AI powered by Apple Intelligence across its ecosystem
description: Tech giant Apple on Monday introduced Siri AI, a completely redesigned version of Siri powered by its new Apple Intelligence system The post Apple introduces Siri AI powered by Apple Intelligence across its ecosystem appeared first on Connected to India News I Singapore l UAE l UK l USA l NRI .
